info.title: MiniMax Overseas - Download Video File
info.description: MiniMax Overseas video file download subdocument. The platform entry path is `/v1/videos/{task_id}/content`. On each request, the gateway calls upstream `GET https://api.minimax.io/v1/files/retrieve` to fetch the latest `download_url` and then proxies the video content back to you.

get.description:
Download completed video content.

For the MiniMax Overseas channel, the gateway does not persist the upstream short-lived `download_url` as a stable result URL. Instead, it uses the stored `file_id` to fetch a fresh download link for each request, which is better suited for long-term stable access.

200.description: Download succeeded. Returns the video binary stream directly.

404.description: The task does not exist, or it has not produced downloadable content yet.
